title: DS-001: Import SCC Reduction — Wave Plan

target.rationale: Reduce C1 from 10.77% to <8% (below high-severity bar); dissolve key cycles via DTO + facade modules

sub_waves.goal: Identify and document SCC structure in `backend/app`
sub_waves.description: Analyze import graph to locate strongly connected components and identify cycle-breaking points
gate_commands: echo 'Manual review: identify 35 files and 2–3 key cutting points'
deliverables: Cutting-point analysis (which modules are at SCC borders)

sub_waves.goal: Extract cycle-breaking DTO module at runtime/services boundary
sub_waves.description: Create app.runtime.internal_contracts with shared DTO types; refactor key __init__.py exports to use this module
deliverables: New internal_contracts.py module with shared types

sub_waves.goal: Promote cycle-boundary facades in API routes and services
sub_waves.description: Create thin re-export layer in app.api.v1 and update route imports to break import edges
deliverables: Thin re-export layer in API v1

sub_waves.goal: Verify SCC reduction and close DS-001
sub_waves.description: Re-run metrics check; verify C1 files and anteil_pct reduced; update state docs; commit closure
deliverables: DS-001 marked CLOSED in input list

notes: Wave 1 is analysis-only (non-code). Waves 2–4 execute implementation with gates. Target: C1 from 10.77% → <8%.
